owner_attestation.recorded_from: workspace maintainer confirmed 港股 provider legacy is no longer needed and deletion may include production code removal

active_workspace_scan.command: rg -n "marketdata rqdata (refresh-hk|inspect-hk|hk-assets|hk-depth)|src/market_data_platform/hk_assets|src/market_data_platform/hk_depth|market_data_platform\\.hk_assets|market_data_platform\\.hk_depth|configs/presets/release/hk_|configs/presets/universe/hk_|configs/presets/hk\\.yml|hk_quarterly_pit_hybrid|hk_rqdata|rqdatac-hk|rqsdk|HK_DATA_PLATFORM_ROOT|hk_data_platform_root" README.md docs scripts tests market-data-platform cross-sectional-trees quant-execution-engine --glob '!**/.git/**' --glob '!**/__pycache__/**' --glob '!**/.pytest_cache/**' --glob '!docs/archive/**' --glob '!cross-sectional-trees/docs/archive/**'

tests and governance fixtures asserting removed HK imports stay blocked
HK_DATA_PLATFORM_ROOT compatibility alias for legacy callers
marketdata migration freeze-hk / hydrate-hk restore controls

research-workspace: UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run --with pytest python -m pytest tests/test_hk_private_archive.py tests/test_hk_public_split_manifest.py tests/test_hk_research_lane_inventory.py tests/test_data_transition_playbook.py tests/test_maintainability_governance.py -q
